subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Time and again hast thou been privileged to attain unto the remembrance of the Wronged One of all horizons. Know thou the value of these remembrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله بذکر مظلوم آفاق مره بعد مره فائز شدی قدر این اذکار را بدان قسم
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of prayer, @thankfulness; gratitude
